approval.summary: Hands fit See-through topwear cleanly in full-body composite. Metric flags (gold ΔE 42-43, sleeve-ratio 1.5-1.8x) reviewed and overridden by visual QC; no Krita cleanup required.

donor.donor_status: DONOR_ONLY — full body of donor image is NOT the master design, only hands extracted
donor.extraction_method: deterministic Pillow + numpy + opencv: golden-fur cluster → 8-connectivity foreground-CC overlap → RGBA crop

asset_format.notes: Each PNG is a tight crop around the visible paw with a small black cuff sliver retained for edge continuity at the sleeve-to-paw seam.

naming_convention.rule: filenames use CHARACTER anatomy, NOT image side

do_not: modify pixel content (byte-identical copy from staging)
promote any other hand-pose variant without a fresh composite QC pass
